basic_details.job_title: AAICLAS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 62 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS)
basic_details.short_information: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS) Assistant (Security) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 62 vacancies have been announced through the AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 27 years with 12th (Sr. Secondary) qualification are eligible to apply for these Assistant (Security) vacancies. The online application process for AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 will start on 11 June 2026 and remain open until 02 July 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 27 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 3 years, Ex-Servicemen: 5 years.

qualification.details: Assistant (Security) - Tirupati: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Trichy: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Madurai: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Bhubaneswar: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Udaipur: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language.

selection_process: Shortlisting (based on higher % marks in 12th) Interaction / Interview Merit list (based on interview marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AAICLAS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
